# The Void — Full LLM Context

## Site Identity

- **Name:** The Void
- **Author:** Miguel Marin Vermelho
- **URL:** https://thevoid-five.vercel.app/
- **Description:** Personal digital garden and portfolio — a contemplative, multilingual space exploring Buddhism, meditation, neuroscience, software engineering, and human connection.
- **Languages used in content:** English, Portuguese, Spanish, French, Japanese (and occasional Italian, German, Luxembourgish, Persian in UI)

---

## Architecture

**Framework:** Astro 5 (static site generation; one dynamic SSR route for search)
**Package manager:** Bun
**Styling:** Tailwind CSS 3 — custom `garden` colour namespace; no `@apply`
**Content:** MDX via `@astrojs/mdx` with Zod-validated content collections
**Search:** Fuse.js (fuzzy, weighted) via `/api/search` endpoint
**Data viz:** D3 + family-chart library
**Deployment:** Vercel with Analytics and Speed Insights
**View transitions:** Astro View Transitions API with viewport prefetching

**Fonts (Astro experimental font API):**
- `--font-inter` — Inter, UI weight 400–800
- `--font-source-serif-4` — Source Serif 4, body weight 300–700 incl. italic
- `--font-cormorant-garamond` — Cormorant Garamond, display weight 400–600 incl. italic

**Theme system:** CSS custom properties + Tailwind `dark:` variant. Persisted in `localStorage`. Inline preload script prevents flash.

**Custom colours (`garden` namespace in tailwind.config.mjs):**

| Token | Light | Dark |
|---|---|---|
| primary | #2D3A3A | #E1E1E1 |
| secondary | #374151 | #C9C9C9 |
| accent | #006400 | #90EE90 |
| background | #F7F7F2 | #1A1A1A |
| surface | #FFFFFF | #2D2D2D |

**Semantic utility classes:** `.text-body`, `.text-body-strong`, `.text-muted`, `.text-label`

---

## Directory Structure

```
src/
├── pages/
│   ├── index.astro                   # Homepage
│   ├── heart-sutra.astro             # Standalone bunkobon (large, inline styles)
│   ├── focus-and-flow.astro          # Standalone bunkobon (large, inline styles)
│   ├── b-30.astro                    # Password-protected, noindex
│   ├── family-tree.astro             # D3 family tree visualisation
│   ├── tags.astro                    # All tags index
│   ├── garden/[...page].astro        # Paginated garden listing
│   ├── garden/[...slug].astro        # Individual post
│   ├── projects/[...slug].astro      # Individual project
│   ├── tag/[tag].astro               # Posts by tag
│   ├── category/[category].astro     # Posts by category
│   └── api/search.ts                 # Dynamic full-text search endpoint
├── layouts/
│   ├── Layout.astro                  # Root: Header, theme toggle, analytics, view transitions
│   ├── PostLayout.astro              # Wraps Layout; post metadata, tags, Connected Notes
│   └── ProjectLayout.astro          # Wraps Layout; project metadata
├── components/                       # 22 components
│   ├── Header.astro
│   ├── Hero.astro                    # Animated scroll arrow, TextCycler greetings
│   ├── About.astro
│   ├── Garden.astro
│   ├── Projects.astro
│   ├── Technologies.astro
│   ├── Writing.astro
│   ├── Languages.astro
│   ├── Contact.astro
│   ├── Search.astro                  # client:load — Fuse.js search with dropdown
│   ├── TextCycler.astro              # client:visible — cycles greetings in 9 languages
│   ├── ThemeToggle.astro             # client:load — dark/light mode
│   ├── PostCard.astro
│   ├── BlogImage.astro
│   ├── Badge.astro
│   ├── BackButton.astro
│   ├── Divider.astro
│   ├── Navigation.astro
│   ├── SectionNumber.astro
│   ├── SectionTitle.astro
│   ├── SectionDescription.astro
│   └── Text.astro
├── content/
│   ├── config.ts                     # Zod schemas for both collections
│   ├── garden/                       # ~50 MDX posts
│   └── projects/                     # 6 MDX project entries
├── lib/
│   ├── data-service.ts               # Centralised cached getCollection wrapper
│   └── technologies.ts               # 80+ technology items with proficiency levels
├── actions/
│   └── index.ts                      # Astro server actions
└── features/
    └── family-tree/
        ├── data/family-members.ts
        └── types.ts
public/
├── void.svg                          # Site icon / favicon
├── enso.svg                          # Zen enso circle
└── og-image.jpg                      # OG social preview (1024×541)
```

---

## Content Collections

### garden

Schema fields:
- `title` (string, required)
- `description` (string, required)
- `publishDate` (date, required)
- `updateDate` (date, optional)
- `category` (string — e.g. "Philosophy", "Meditation")
- `tags` (string[], optional)
- `image` (string, optional — path to image asset)
- `connections` (array of `{ label, href }`, optional — related links)

Sample posts (representative, not exhaustive):
- *Emptiness* — dependent origination, Buddhist philosophy
- *Lessons from the mountains* — Yamabushi monks in Japan
- *Corporate enlightenment* — mindfulness in the workplace
- *Hemispatial Neglect* — neurology narrative
- *Hyperreality in a square* — perception meditation
- *Constant meditation* — meditation without closing eyes
- *Have You Ever Seen a Tree?* — questioning perception
- *Think like Nāgārjuna* — Madhyamaka Buddhist philosophy
- *Dying every day* — impermanence and letting go
- *Mon père* — French poem for father
- *Amor de mãe* — Portuguese reflection on mothers
- *Para la Yaya* — Spanish poem for grandmother's 103rd birthday
- *A ilha* — St. Lucia sunset reflection
- *Loops on a train* — short fiction
- *O Búzio* — seashell meditation
- *Sol y canciones* — Spanish songs reflection

### projects

Schema fields:
- `title`, `description`, `image`, `link`, `website`, `github`
- `status` (enum: "current" | "completed" | "archived")
- `startDate`, `endDate`
- `tags[]`
- `features[]` (string descriptions)
- `techStack[]` (`{ category, items[] }`)
- `challenges[]`, `learnings[]`
- `gallery[]` (`{ image, caption }`)

Projects:
1. **FLOWN** (current) — Science-backed deep work platform; author is CTO. Virtual coworking and expert-led focus sessions.
2. **Heart Sutra Bunkobon** (completed) — Interactive bilingual Buddhist text with sumi-e illustrations, furigana/romaji toggles, animated Enso circle.
3. **Pokemon Recall** (completed) — Memory training game.
4. **Personal website v1** (archived) — First Astro site.
5. **Omniago** (archived) — Crowdsourced debate platform for climate misinformation.
6. **Readium** (archived) — Reading tracking app.

---

## Data Layer

**`DataService`** (`src/lib/data-service.ts`) — always use this, never call `getCollection()` directly:

- `DataService.getGardenPosts()` — all posts
- `DataService.getProjects()` — all projects
- `DataService.getCategories()` — unique categories
- `DataService.getTags()` — unique tags
- `DataService.getPostsByCategory(category)`
- `DataService.getPostsByTag(tag)`
- `DataService.getSearchData()` — search index (posts + categories + tags)
- `DataService.clearCache()` — development use

---

## Search

Endpoint: `GET /api/search?q={query}&filter={all|garden-only|projects-only}`

- Powered by Fuse.js
- Not prerendered (dynamic SSR)
- Scoring weights: title 0.4, description 0.3, category 0.15, tags 0.1
- Returns results with score and content-type metadata

---

## Special Pages

### `/heart-sutra`
Self-contained, 1000+ line `.astro` file. Do not refactor into components without care.
- Hand-painted Enso SVG with conic-mask reveal animation and ink-splash particles
- Washi-paper aesthetic (cream backgrounds, traditional ink tones)
- Bilingual Heart Sutra (Japanese with furigana + English translation)
- Toggle controls for furigana and romaji visibility
- Full dark mode support

### `/focus-and-flow`
Large self-contained bunkobon page.
- Concentric ripple SVG circles (stone-drop visualisation)
- Research from FLOWN, Cal Newport (*Deep Work*), Csikszentmihalyi (*Flow*)
- Bunkobon-style book layout
- Dark mode support


---

## Author Profile

**Miguel Marin Vermelho**
Polyglot biologist turned software engineer. CTO at FLOWN.

Languages: English, Portuguese, Spanish, French, Luxembourgish, Japanese

Technology proficiency (from `technologies.ts`):

| Level | Technologies |
|---|---|
| Expert | TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, React, Next.js, Node.js, MongoDB, Stripe, Vercel, Claude Code, Cursor |
| Advanced | Bash, Webpack, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Docker, Datadog, Bitrise, Customer.io, Segment |
| Intermediate | Angular, Bun, Vite, AWS, Digital Ocean, Cloudflare, Statsig |
| Basic | Python, Flutter, Kubernetes |

---

## Key Conventions for AI Assistance

1. Use `DataService` — never `getCollection()` directly
2. Use Astro's `<Image>` component for all images
3. Use `garden-*` colour tokens, not raw Tailwind colours
4. No `@apply` — Tailwind utilities directly or scoped `<style>` blocks
5. Only use `client:*` directives for genuinely interactive components (currently: Search, TextCycler, ThemeToggle)
6. Large special pages (`heart-sutra.astro`, `focus-and-flow.astro`, `b-30.astro`) use inline styles — treat with care
7. No test runner or linting scripts; TypeScript checked via `astro check`
8. Fonts via CSS variables: `--font-inter`, `--font-source-serif-4`, `--font-cormorant-garamond`
